summary.title: Usage Summary
summary.lead: Your plan includes a limited amount of usage. If exceeded, you may experience restrictions, since overages are not currently billed. It may take up to 1 hour to reflect any usage changes.

tooltips.notIncluded: This feature is not included on your current plan. Upgrade to unlock it.
tooltips.ssoUsersLocked: Team plan includes up to 100 monthly active SSO users. Upgrade to enable single sign-on for your organization.
tooltips.imageTransformsLocked: Team plan includes unlimited storage image transformations. Upgrade to optimize images on delivery.
tooltips.seats: Your {{planName}} plan includes up to {{limit}} seats. Active and invited members count toward this limit.
tooltips.emailsFree: {{planName}} includes 3,000 emails per billing cycle and up to 100 emails per day (UTC) for transactional sends.
tooltips.emails: {{planName}} includes {{limit}} per billing cycle for transactional and marketing sends.
tooltips.apiRequests: {{planName}} includes {{limit}} per billing cycle across sending and management endpoints.
tooltips.webhookDeliveries: {{planName}} includes {{limit}} per billing cycle for event notifications.
tooltips.storage: {{planName}} includes {{limit}} of file and attachment storage.
tooltips.ssoUsers: Team plan includes {{limit}} for SSO-enabled sign-ins each billing cycle.
tooltips.imageTransforms: Team plan includes {{limit}} for on-the-fly image processing.
tooltips.default: {{planName}} includes {{limit}} for this metric each billing cycle.
